title: 🇺🇸 Join us in NYC for Elevate 2024 🇺🇸

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Join us in NEW YORK for Elevate 2024

Elevate 2024 is coming, and for the first time, our conference is in PERSON!!!

Join us for our yearly community gathering created for YOU – our valued community. This year, we’re bringing the community into the spotlight like never before with a community lounge and content based on your feedback. Our conference will be taking place in person in London, New York City, and Sydney!

But that’s not all – our community has first access to our Early Bird tickets!

Hurry up; the Early bird discount won’t last forever! Register now.

Looking forward to getting to meet many of you in our exclusive community lounge at Elevate 2024!

Save the date 4x52304×2880 172 KB

posts.author: erinsoftr (Erin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Julietteb — any way to get a ticket for this event even though it’s sold out??

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Erin! I will reach out to the team and see if there is a waitlist we can add you too!
